attractions.name: Balangay Shrine Museum
attractions.description: Home to the oldest known balangay boats in the Philippines, showcasing Butuan's maritime heritage.

attractions.name: Butuan National Museum
attractions.description: Exhibits archaeological finds and cultural artifacts from Agusan del Norte.
attractions.address: Jose S. Aquino Ave, Butuan City

attractions.name: Guingona Park
attractions.description: Historic park in the heart of downtown Butuan, popular for leisure and events.

attractions.name: Delta Discovery Park
attractions.description: Nature park along the Agusan River with walking trails and river views.
